name: ettercap-graphical
title: ettercap-graphical
description:
Ettercap GUI-enabled executable
Ettercap supports active and passive dissection of many protocols
(even encrypted ones) and includes many feature for network and host
analysis.
.
Data injection in an established connection and filtering (substitute
or drop a packet) on the fly is also possible, keeping the connection
synchronized.
.
Many sniffing modes are implemented, for a powerful and complete
sniffing suite. It is possible to sniff in four modes: IP Based, MAC Based,
ARP Based (full-duplex) and PublicARP Based (half-duplex).
.
Ettercap also has the ability to detect a switched LAN, and to use OS
fingerprints (active or passive) to find the geometry of the LAN.
.
This package contains the ettercap GUI-enabled executable.

commands.name: ettercap
commands.description: multipurpose sniffer/content filter for man in the middle attacks

commands.name: etterfilter
commands.description: Filter compiler for ettercap content filtering engine

commands.name: etterlog
commands.description: Log analyzer for ettercap log files

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ettercap because Ettercap GUI-enabled executable.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ettercap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ettercap [OPTIONS] [TARGET1] [TARGET2]` as documented upstream for ettercap.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ettercap -Tp` as documented upstream for ettercap.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ettercap -Tzq` as documented upstream for ettercap.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ettercap -T -j /tmp/victims -M arp /$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST-7/ /$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST-20/` as documented upstream for ettercap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ettercap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ettercap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: ettercap - multipurpose sniffer/content filter for man in the middle attacks ***** IMPORTANT NOTE ****** Since ettercap NG (formerly 0.7.0), all the options have been changed. Even the target speci- fication has been changed. Please read carefully this man page.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install ettercap. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `ettercap -Tp`. Further invocations from upstream: `ettercap -Tzq`; `ettercap -T -j /tmp/victims -M arp /$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST-7/ /$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST-20/`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Ettercap GUI-enabled executable.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: ettercap - multipurpose sniffer/content filter for man in the middle attacks ***** IMPORTANT NOTE ****** Since ettercap NG (formerly 0.7.0), all the options have been changed. Even the target speci- fication has been changed. Please read carefully this man page.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install ettercap
Install with: sudo apt install ettercap
